name: Phantasm Spiral Assault
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>煌</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>渦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 "Phantasm Spiral Dragon" you control; when it destroys 3 Effect Monsters your opponent controls, by battle, while equipped with 3 or more "Phantasm Spiral" Equip Spell Cards with different names, you win the Duel. If "Umi" is on the field, you can activate this card from your hand. If a Normal Monster(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can banish this card from your Graveyard instead.
eff: Target 1 "Phantasm Spiral Dragon" you control; when it destroys 3 Effect Monsters your opponent controls, by battle, while equipped with 3 or more "Phantasm Spiral" Equip Spell Cards with different names, you win the Duel. If "Umi" is on the field, you can activate this card from your hand. If a Normal Monster(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can banish this card from your Graveyard instead.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
Can be activated from the hand
